name: Jack Twentyman
text: Maintenance massage with Jordan has became a key part of my recovery. Always feel brand new in the legs after. Now training will be increased will certainly help even more going forward in future.

name: John Andrewartha
text: Excellent all round and would highly recommend.

name: Henry h
text: In for another maintenance tonight as well addressing some issues caused from football. Jord helped with all areas and gave some sound advice to put into my training to help prevent the same issue again. 10/10

name: Alex Taylor
text: I went to see Jordan tonight.

name: Chris Highton
text: I seen Jordan for a maintenance massage to help with my back pain, and I’m already feeling such a difference! The tension has already eased, I’ll definitely be back — thanks for the knowledge and the session!

name: Miguel
text: Really happy with the service Jord provided. Proper knowledgeable guy who takes his time to explain things clearly and in a way that makes sense. Came out feeling miles better. Couldn’t recommend him enough.

name: Paul Marsden
text: I received an absolutely fantastic sports massage that melted away the tension from my daily grind! Jord was incredibly skilled, zeroing in on my tight spots with perfect precision and care. His professional yet positive approach made the experience so relaxing and restorative. I feel lighter, more relaxed, and ready to take on my day to day with renewed energy. Booking in my next session soon, which will be my 3rd session since starting with REP with Robson, I highly recommend!

name: Andrew Sim
text: In for a sports massage on my legs, certainly knew what he was doing will definitely be back

name: Alex Spiers
text: I’ve been to Jordan multiple times now for maintenance massages and I always feel better afterwards! His treatment combined with his knowledge around mobility have been super helpful!

name: Codie Slessor
text: Highly recommend Jord for any recovery massages. Took his time to explain things and felt instant relief. He is professional and efficient. 10/10 for sure!

name: Ste Tingey
text: About 8months ago had a bad shoulder injury the worse it had been went from 60kg dumbells to not being able to press anything had weekly sessions with Jordan initially. Improving my movement week on week very slow progress at the start to getting back to 60kg dumbells again now honestly don't think I would have got back to where I am now without Jordans help weeks of frustration but his persistence with helping me with this injury has been massive. I know just at the stage where we have fortnightly maintenence work but it's been huge have recommended to other people who have booked in based on the help he has given me.

name: Sarah Robson
text: Had my first physio session with Jordan for pain in my glutes and knee when running. He really knew his stuff and explained everything really clearly. Took time to assess properly, did some massage and needling, and gave me exercises to do at home. Super friendly and made me feel really comfortable. Felt so much better afterwards and really reassured — would definitely recommend!

name: Alex Otway
text: Had an amazing pre and post-marathon massage that made a huge difference! The pre-race session got me feeling prepped and ready, and the post-race one sorted out my sore legs and helped me recover.

name: Daniela
text: Booked in for my first maintenance massage with Jordon and I was very happy with the treatment. He included cupping and a stretch with the cups on. I left feeling like my tightness had been eased! Thank you!

name: Monika Lason
text: Sport massage is a great addition to any athlete’s routine, and that exactly what Jordan offers plus much more. Great massage, 10 out of 10, highly recommended

name: Adam
text: Absolutely spot on! Jordan’s clearly very knowledgeable and has helped massively. Will certainly be back. Thanks again

name: Heather Gorst
text: I had a great treatment with Jordan today! All the added needling, cupping and excellent knowledge and all round good craic! And In a great location in the middle of town! Get it booked for your coffee break, lunch break or post work stretch! Thank you!

name: Jack Twentyman
text: Maintenance massage with Jordan last night after the weekends Cumbrian run. Feel brand new this morning, he knows his stuff, would highly recommend. Always have a good craic too 👌🏻

name: Henry H
text: First one back after surgery, Jord assessed and addressed issues I was struggling with and I left feeling brand new. Top service as always, can’t recommend enough

name: Mary Oghani
text: I came in with a painful IT band syndrome which was stopping me from running and was getting worse. Jordan was knowledgeable, and supportive throughout my recovery. He quickly identified the underlying issues, gave me effective treatment, and set me up with exercises to keep progressing at home. Highly recommended!”

name: Cathrene Mieras
text: Had a brilliant sports massage with Jord after my race at the weekend. He was really professional and knowledgeable, and the lower body treatment was the perfect way to boost my recovery . My legs felt so much better afterwards — highly recommend!

name: Stas
text: I have been getting sports massage treatments for last 6 months and never felt better for it! Always come away feeling unreal couldn’t recommend more!

name: Brandon Allen
text: Gave a great in-depth assessment. Offered great advice on how to maintain a steady recovery with good exercises and stretches. Really friendly and professional.

name: Andrew Pearson
text: Great sessions identifying injuries, remedial therapy and additional information to help support ongoing recovery. Top Bloke.

name: Joanne cowing
text: My first time with Jordan and have to say very friendly relaxed and professional talked me through everything And I can actually move around after my massage thank you so much will definitely be booking in again soon

name: paul fisher
text: Great massage and talk regarding treatment for future events. Look forward to next time.

name: Nathan Sellers
text: Jordan is both professional and friendly, which was something I was looking for. Jordan is currently helping me with an ongoing back issue and I already have noticed significant improvements in the short time he has been working with me!

name: Tom Barnes
text: Went for a maintenance massage before the GNR at the weekend. Very knowledgeable and would definitely recommend!

name: Lewis Clements
text: Pure gentleman very nice easy going good to deal with. Knows his stuff left after one session feeling the difference straight away 👌🏻

name: Ella Murray
text: i had a sports massage with jordan for a lower back injury, pain gone within 1 session! can’t recommend enough was very thorough during assessment and so so knowledgeable and gave me so much advice on what i can do to help further! would recommend to anyone! thankyou so so much!

name: Josh Thompson
text: Class first session with Jord today - booked a maintenance session with him every month going forward.

name: Matthew Carlse
text: Brilliant treatment. Couldn't fault Jordan.

name: Rebecca cork
text: After experiencing shoulder pain into fore arms, Jordan was able to correct this for me and now pain free. This pain had been long standing and began to get worse. Jordan was very knowledgeable and took time to assess my needs throughout the consultation and treatment period. I would definitely recommend and will revisit at some point.

name: Scott
text: Jordan was brilliant has really helped relieve the upper back pain I had and gave me some great advise around future prevention too. Highly recommend going to see him!

name: Ben Thomson
text: Jordan did a fantastic job and knows his stuff. My first appointment with him and has helped me so much and has given me some good information to help me. I'd highly recommend him to anyone.

name: Richard calvert
text: Jordan is very knowledgeable in what he does, excellent service and value for money

name: Janene Carruthers
text: Brilliant and knowledgable Therapist I would highly recommend to everyone.

name: Brad little
text: Brilliant lad and very knowledgeable knew what he was doing from start to finish and explained every part. Went in with shoulder pain and he sorted it right out. Would highly recommend

name: Robert Bozic
text: I would definitely recommend Robson Muscle Mechanics, knowledgeable and plenty of advise how to manage your injury. This time tried (not too keen on needles but) sort of acupuncture that speeds up the healing process. Gentle nip and you forget the needle is in. Thank you Jordan, starting to run again ( slowly 😊 )

name: Tom Lewis
text: Another excellent session with Jordan, eased niggles in my back. Advised exercises to help strengthen muscles and avoid injury. Booked in again for a maintenance massage, highly recommend 👍

name: Jack
text: excellent service, standard for this lad. went in with tight legs left feeling like a new man - highly recommend

name: Ste Tingey
text: Brilliant sports massage had issues with shoulder injury which is pretty much sorted and years of problems with lower back Jordan has got me up and running again really appreciate his hard work top professional

name: Daniel Tolson
text: Managed to get in with Jordan within 2 hours using his online appointments. Always a decent service. Would recommend to others.

name: Ellis Nixon
text: Very clued up and happy to listen about my injuries, felt instant relief from just one session. Top bloke

name: Jack Twentyman
text: 3rd session with Jordan tonight. my monthly maintenance massage, always sorts out any problems and niggles I’m having. Very knowledgable. The monthly visits are helping me up my training for an and coming race. Highly recommend.

name: Kyle Welden
text: 10/10 robson muscle mechanics knows exactly what he’s doing sits and listens to your problems and concerns and does / tells you exactly how to fix the problem with demonstrations to feel a million times better and problems hardly noticeable definitely improved 100% recommend

name: Alex Taylor
text: Yet again. Top quality. I’ve really enjoyed the blade/scraper that he’s been using. This mans knows the craic.

name: Shaw
text: Had Robbson come and treat me for a recurring chronic neck issue. Feel brand new and like a weight has been lifted post treatment. Very professional and a top service. 5 stars and recommend to anyone, especially from a sporting background.

name: Beverley Young
text: *Brilliant treatment with Jordan* sorted my aching back and tight hips so I can get back to my training programme and sleep soundly tonight, thanks so much for your help! Thoroughly recommend getting booked in with any injury niggles asap! 🎉🙏

name: Graham Lightfoot
text: Impressed with Jordon’s knowledge. Quickly identified what transpires to be a torn rotator cuff, did some work on it, used needles which I didn’t even feel at the time. Walked in not being able to raise my left arm, walked out thinking I’ll be back in the gym by the weekend. Good lad.

name: Dave P901
text: So after months of hip and lower back pain,which was getting increasingly worse and working 12hr shifts on my feet something had to be done.When Jordan came highly recommended I got booked in.After only a hand full of treatments I’m pleased to say both areas are 100% improved! Comes with a wealth of knowledge and helpful advice..Thank you Jordan

name: Chris Clarke
text: 2nd visit from Jordan, this time due to another injury. Effectively diagnosed the issue and feeling confident I am now doing the right things to help the injury heal. Thanks again.

name: Henry Heaney
text: Top stuff as always, Jord assessed and worked on recurring injuries to my knee and shoulder giving me some tips to implement into my training going forward. Couldn’t recommended enough.

name: Coogan
text: Jordan has helped me through my last couple fight camps, Fixing any aches and pains that have arose due to rigorous training. I would highly recommend Jordan to anyone competing in a physically demanding sport.

name: Lewis Smith
text: Came to see Jordon for a chronic shoulder injury, brilliant experience, very knowledgeable, and an all round nice lad. Good crack and his magic works. 10/10. 100% recommend.

name: Toby Huggon
text: Jord came to see me today after work. I have had an ongoing muscle pain preventing me from doing the sports I love and any other physical activity’s including my job as a plasterer. In an hours session he was able to explain to me various body mechanics which may have caused the problem. Then within twenty minutes into the massage I could already feel the relief he kept digging and also found various more other areas of tension and knots. I feel like a new man. I could not recommend him more if I have any future issues i will be going straight to him.

name: Keanan
text: Heard about Jord just through social media, thought I’d give him ago considering I’ve never once looked after my body and recently started playing rugby for 2 teams, first session I couldn’t believe how much tension was relieved and have never looked back, I try get a massage every month to 6 weeks mostly concentrating on my shoulders however Robsons attention to detail and care for his clients means he goes beyond what I ask and makes sure my legs arnt tight and back is also in good shape, for upcoming games and training. The man’s a genius and I recommend to anyone especially someone who plays sport

name: Phil
text: I had regular massages from Jordan helping with my training towards a triathlon. This has helped with injury prevention and stay in top shape for my training and triathlon. I can only recommend Jordan to anyone looking for a sports massage.

name: Sue
text: Been having regular lower body maintenance sessions with Jordan for a few months now. To be honest, if I didn’t, I think I would just put up with injury niggles, which would get progressively worse and hinder my training. Jordan wrote up strength & mobility exercises which would benefit me and has since advised new ones to treat a recent injury. If you’re serious about your training, you need to be serious about your recovery!

name: Robert Bozic
text: Jordan was highly recommended by my wife's PT. I made an appointment and filled in a short online form. He arrived on time to my home. He took his time to listen all about my "hamstring problem" checked physically my movements and talked me through the mechanics of movement. Then he carried out the sports massage and after talked me through the exercises that he believes would help in my recovery. I am very thankful for his time and his advice and will continue to have future treatments from him. If you have a sports injury I would definitely recommend Jordan for helping with your recovery.

name: Zoe Rayson
text: Would recommend Jordan, he offered great advice and a massage, for shoulder pain i have being experiencing!

name: Chris belcher
text: I’ve been going with Jordan for about 6 months and I’ve seen a lot of progress was barely sleeping cause I couldn’t get comfy I couldn’t breathe right with the pain in my neck and I realised I’m not struggling with it as much all round feel better course I still get some pain but not as regular no where near as intense you know what your doing and you actually care about your so I totally recommend anyone needing a miracle get on Jordan he’s a top man knows what he’s doing 👌

name: Taylor
text: Keep coming back! Great massage and great craic, couldn't recommend more.

name: Josh Monkhouse
text: Jordan was very welcoming and professional. He is quick to see if you have any aches and pains and gets right to work. Had me feeling loose and relaxed after the massage and was very knowledgeable and helpful I’d highly recommend.

name: Tom Lewis
text: Superb service, very professional and really helped to ease pain. Great advice and aftercare with stretches recommended to aid recovery. Booked in for next appointment after the session, would definitely recommend 👍

name: Beverley
text: Great session with Jordan some deep tissue work really helped with a longstanding shoulder niggle and some needed mobility help for the hips, thanks so much and highly recommend getting yourself booked in with Jordan! 🎉😇

name: Tom Percival
text: Had my first ever sports massage from Jordan today. He was very knowledgeable and got me ready for a triathlon on the weekend! Highly recommend

name: Jenna Whelan
text: Very impressed with using Jordan, he came short notice to help me with bad back pain, he helped me so much, explained everything to me and relieved my issue. I have been great since my treatment and i will now make sure I book in regular as a precaution- thank you.

name: Frankie
text: Very professional service and knowledgable. Felt comfortable! Highly recommend and booked straight back in for another treatment!

name: Jack Twentyman
text: Found out about Robson muscle mechanics through a friend. I’d Been having bother with tightness through training etc and having lower back problems. booked a maintenance massage on the advice from Jordan. Jordan arrived on time and we discussed where I was at with everything. Maintenance masssge was ideal for what I was after. I’ve booked in for next month, so would recommend.

name: Ian Smith
text: Found out about Robson Muscle Mechanics through a friend. I received a prompt reply when contacting them, found him to be very knowledgeable and helpful from consultation to post-appointment. He tailored his suggestions and the session to my specific needs. Pleased to say I’m booked in again for a post-event massage after a marathon on Monday and am very much looking forward to it. Highly recommended.

name: Chris Clarke
text: I've been having some lower leg issues affecting my fell walking and someone recommended an initial session with Jordan. Easy process to book, turned up on time and is a very personable guy who put me at ease very quickly. Very knowledgeable and offered good advice. Talked me through the physical therapy he was doing and the reasons for it.

name: Courtney
text: 10/10 would recommend! I’ve had a sore leg for a while and I’m just annoyed I didn’t go to Jord sooner! He helped so much, can’t believe the difference after 1 session. He made me feel so comfortable and was really professional. He explained everything, so that I understood what was going on and felt relaxed. He checked in regularly to make sure I wasn’t uncomfortable or in any pain. Thank you so much!

name: Keanan Foster
text: First time cupping with Robson,eased a lot of achy leg pains.Still get regular massages and the man’s a genius I recommend him to everyone

name: Harry Moscrop
text: Shoulder and back pain. Got an appointment promptly with Robson, quick consultation and straight into treatment. Great maintenance massage and cupping, tailored to my needs. Seen a difference in posture straight away and knowledgable advice going ahead with further treatment. Top man would highly recommend 👍🏻💪🏻.

name: Ross
text: Had 2 cupping sessions off Jordan, a brilliant & proffesional service and one i’ll be continuing on with.

name: Henry Heaney
text: Top notch, never been one to be proactive and only acted after an injury. Jord discussed areas where I was feeling tension and tailored the session around that. Targeted and effective, it left me feeling brand new. Highly recommend to anyone who lives an active lifestyle.

name: Charlie Watson
text: First time have cupping with Jordan, and it was class! Jordan is very professional and knows what he’s doing he ran me through everything. Cheers Jordan 💪

name: Alex
text: I’ve had cupping done in the past the traditional way.

name: Beverley
text: My first session with Jordan today and I'll definitely be booking again, he quickly found where I'd been neglecting for a while and brought back mobility using assisted stretching, massage and cupping #feeling great thanks! :)

name: Taylor Sindall
text: amazing massage and great understanding of the body jordan talked me through what muscles groups i can work on in the gym to prevent the issues i had been having. and also tailored the massage to help with this. hundred percent would recommend

name: Ben Simpson
text: I had a few niggles, aches and pains, and some pretty tight quads. Maintenance massage helped ease off the stiff legs and cupping was used to ease off some mid-back issues. Would highly recommend

name: Craig
text: On time very knowledgeable lad got to work on the parts pointed out appreciate it keep the good work up .

name: Jobert
text: Maintenance massage with cupping ahead of Competition prep for ATHX has really helped.

name: Brian Morris
text: Very good and professional service. I was tight and tensed in my shoulder and was causing me problems but since the treatment I feel very lose and relaxed. Excellent service from robson muscle mechanics. 🥇

name: Ashleigh
text: Instant relief from my first massage tonight, After suffering 6 weeks with shoulder pain. Can’t recommend enough! So so good and it’s amazing to be pain free literally straight away after 1 session! Highly recommend! Lovely guy and good crack. Will deffo be booking again

name: Ashleigh Foster
text: Instant relief from my first massage tonight, After suffering 6 weeks with shoulder pain. Can’t recommend enough! So so good and it’s amazing to be pain free literally straight away after 1 session! Highly recommend! Lovely guy and good crack. Will deffo be booking again

name: Liam Owen
text: An all round great guy. Professional, knowledgeable and great at what he does! Robson muscle mechanics were at a competition I took part in today and finishing the day off with a massage and cupping was just what I needed.

name: Jonny Bradley
text: Jordan was amazing on competition day! He totally knew what he was doing and helped me secure a podium spot. I would highly recommend him.

name: Adam Johnston
text: Top notch service from Robson, incredibly friendly and professional service! Robson took the time to full assess everything, answer all my questions and confidently went over all my areas of concern.

name: James Macdonald
text: Incredibly happy with the work Jordan has done for me, I am preparing for a Strongman event and had a few niggling aches and pains that he has helped me with and he is also going to be helping me pre and post event. Definitely going to be making regular appointments with him for maintenance as I continue my journey in the Strongman sport.

name: Matt Davo
text: 10/10 Service, sorted out some shoulder issues I have been having for a while. Could feel the difference instantly the next day. Already booked in for my next appointment. Would recommend highly!

name: Matt Davison
text: 10/10 service, Jordan came round and sorted out a few back issues I had, could feel the difference the next day when I was training, next appointment already booked in!

name: Mattie Purvis
text: Wow, woke up day after treatment & the difference is amazing. Great service! Got booked in for a follow up in the coming weeks. Recommend to anyone.

name: Sue Collier
text: Had my first session with Jordan yesterday, after ignoring a few niggles for a while. Very much needed deep tissue massage on my lower body. Jordan also offered some helpful tips going forwards, to strengthen areas up and prevent injury. Made me realise I need to pay more attention to my recovery. I have booked back in with him next month and will definitely be seeing him on a regular basis.

name: Ryan James
text: The best! Went to Jordan with an arm issue from training, can feel a massive difference after one session and tensions gone. First class, thank you

name: Harvey Foster
text: Came to Jordan because of a shoulder injury, with one session im already feeling a lot better, definitely recommend and will definitely be getting booked in again.

name: Philip Hindes
text: I went to Jordan for tight calves and general injury prevention. After the first session Jordan diagnosed the right tight spots and managed to ease these off to get me back running again. I will be using him on a regular basis to keep on top of issues and general injury prevention.

name: Benn MacLeod
text: Recently had a treatment off of Robson Muscle Mechanics, and it was a great treatment from start to finish.

name: Ben h
text: Went to Jordan for a calf problem , sorted it out and also helped with fatigue after heavy training. Couldn’t recommend enough! Top man!

name: Elliot Pearson
text: Had a couple sessions with Jordan now. Irons out all the small aches, will be getting booked in again shortly!!

name: Ross Rae
text: Had been having trouble with tightness in back and rounded shoulders, instant relief after first session and already ahave follow up appointment booked. Top service⭐️

name: Ross Henderson
text: Top rub down great prices, had a full hour session for 30 quid slightly discounted but was well worth it.

name: Nick Brown
text: Very knowledgeable on aches and pains - advised me with some mobility exercises, great sports massage

name: JBMG
text: Professional service from a knowledgeable and friendly individual. Would highly recommend

name: Alex Culley
text: I have a very labour intensive job and long hours on my feet all day have compounded into lots of aches and pains over the last few years. I recently got a sports massage from Jordan and I am absolutely blown away by the results, I've gone from taking painkillers each night to being completely pain free in my affected areas after just one massage! Highly highly recommend and will be making this a regular thing for myself. Thanks a lot!

name: Keanan Foster
text: Booked in with Robson to help with a shoulder I’ve had problems with for nearly a year,soon sorted after a few sessions. I now book in for every few weeks for a massage great attention to detail and top crack aswell

name: zachary mark
text: Loverly fella, v good at his craft and helped a lot with a sciatic nerve injury. Would highly recommend to anyone struggling with any pains or niggles. Worth every penny. Booked again for the near future. Thankyou again

name: Hannah Musgrave
text: Jordan fit me in for a massage at short notice. Was much needed after a 10 mile run! He treated my legs, glutes, back & neck - all with great pressure. All areas covered really well. Great maintenance massage. Cheers Jord!

name: Coogan
text: Great sports massage! Jordan has really helped me throughout my fight camp. With any injuries or niggles I have acquired along the way.

name: Hannah Wilkinson
text: Jordan gave me a really great massage, my calves feel a lot less tight today. He checked in several times, checking the pressure was okay and made me feel very comfortable.

name: Alex Taylor
text: I’ve been struggling with a bad back, neck and calves for years.

name: Dom Harrison
text: The first session has my body feeling less tense, look forward to the next session, highly recommend.

name: Dave Patterson
text: Had my first appointment with Jord today and was very impressed at the service he provides.Very knowledgeable,professional and very helpful with my needs going forward.Booked straight back in for my next appointment! Highly recommend.

name: Ben
text: Jordans knowledge helped me truly understand my injury and how to prevent it going forward! I look forward to my next session.

name: Liam Delaney
text: Been struggling with back pain for a couple of weeks now and already feeling the benefits from my maintenance massage. Would highly recommend for anyone who’s into sport or fitness!

name: Keanan Foster
text: Got in touch with Robson over an on going shoulder problem after just a few sessions seen significant improvement, always feel like new after a massage off him,great attention to detail and top notch crack aswell

name: Jobert Fermilan
text: Really helped my injury, I’ll be using Robson Muscle Mechanics for a while!

name: Jobert
text: Jordan was exactly what I needed, it loosened my right shoulder and neck which has been hurting for a few weeks now, it needs more maintenance needed to help sort it out.

name: Ross
text: Great massage on my back and shoulders for rock climbing recovery!! Will be back

name: Jamie
text: Huge personality, skilled technique and efficient service from Robson. Could not recommend enough for anyone seeking the benefits of a high quality sports massage!

name: Danny
text: After being let down by my usual massage therapist I was put in touch with Jordan by a friend. After a brief conversation he got me an appointment the same day. Felt the benefit within hours. New booking system shows his availability which is very helpful. Top service. Now used him 3 times.

name: Kev Elsworth
text: Had robson round yesterday working on my shoulder/neck areas after having some trouble this past week. Woke up today feeling fresh, would recommend getting him in if your having any trouble. Thanks again pal 👍

name: Charlie
text: The best massage! Felt brand new straight after it. Great customer service and good conversation during it. Already got my next one booked as we booked in right after the massage. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

name: Elliot Pearson
text: I had a tight lower back and just after one session I can really tell a big difference, great guy good craic. Definitely more sessions on the way. Thanks.

name: Geoff Bulman
text: I was having issues with tight legs & glutes, I was recommended to give Jordan a call. He managed to get me booked in within 24 hours & came to me which was a massive bonus. After my first appointment my issues seemed to improve. Will be booking in again soon for a follow up. 5 ⭐️
